# OpenCV prebuilt (generated)

This directory is produced by `scripts/build_qt_mingw.ps1` and is not committed.

After build you should see:

- `include/opencv2/opencv.hpp`
- `x64/mingw/lib/*.dll.a`
- `x64/mingw/bin/*.dll`
- `.opencv_built` stamp file

Run qmake / build from Qt Creator, or:

```powershell
powershell -File scripts/build_qt_mingw.ps1
```
